calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond would not result in compliance. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

VINCENT DIXON, CLAIMANT IS PRESENT

RULING:
DANIEL BYRNE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR CLAIMANT VINCENT DIXON IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (301/JLW) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558
